examples: The speedboat took off, skimming the waves.
The engine broke and the speedboat stopped all of a sudden.
The sailing boat fell foul of a motor speedboat in mid-river.
The speedboat contained three men, and its name, Siempre Maximo, was painted on the bow.
Here, it becomes things like a speedboat, a spaceship gangway (I think) and an all-purpose promontory.
